---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for pi-taskflow
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: heggria
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear and concise description of what you're trying to accomplish. Example: "I need to be able to fan out N variants of an analysis and pick the best result."

**Current workaround**
How are you doing it today without the feature? Example: "I run the same task 5 times manually and compare the outputs."

**Proposed solution**
If you have a concrete idea for how pi-taskflow could address this:

- Phase type suggestion
- DSL syntax
- TUI / command enhancement

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches you've thought about.

**Is this a good fit?**
- [ ] It's an orchestration concern (not a subagent / model / prompting concern)
- [ ] It fits the declarative JSON-DSL model (not imperative scripting)
- [ ] It doesn't require new runtime dependencies

> **Response time:** I review feature requests ~weekly. Ideas that align with the [STRATEGY.md](./STRATEGY.md) roadmap get priority.
